clues.clue: This McDonald's breakfast sandwich stacks egg, cheese and Canadian bacon on a muffin.
'Two all-beef patties, special sauce, lettuce, cheese' describes this towering McDonald's burger.
This thick Wendy's dessert comes in chocolate or vanilla and resists a straw.
Taco Bell's hexagonal grilled item is the 'Crunchwrap' followed by this word.
Arby's built its reputation on thin-sliced piles of this seasoned beef.
Arizona's capital shares its name with a mythical bird reborn from ashes.
Wisconsin's capital is named for the fourth U.S. president.
Minnesota's capital, named for an apostle, is the twin city to Minneapolis.
Indiana's capital tacks the Greek word for 'city' onto the state's name.
Colorado's 'Mile-High' capital sits at roughly 5,280 feet of elevation.
These half-shell heroes were 'teenage,' 'mutant' and 'ninja.'
The 'One Saturday Morning' block aired on this alphabet broadcast network.
This bumbling cyborg detective relied on niece Penny and a dog named Brain to crack cases.
Captain Planet's powers came from rings of Earth, Fire, Wind, Water and this fifth element.
This 1990 eco-hero was summoned when five Planeteers combined their rings.
'Melts in your mouth, not in your hands' is the long-time line for these candy-shelled chocolates.
Among the M&M's spokescandies, this nervous-voiced color often plays the dim one.
'Sometimes you feel like a nut' pairs Almond Joy with this nut-free coconut cousin.
Skittles invites fans to 'taste the' this colorful arc.
PEZ candy is dispensed from collectible toppers shaped like these cartoon noggins.
This chain with golden arches was built into a giant by Ray Kroc from a brothers' stand.
This flame-grilled chain bills itself the 'Home of the Whopper.'
This square-patty chain was named for founder Dave Thomas's red-haired daughter.
This West Coast chain is famous for a secret menu and 'animal style' orders.
This Wisconsin-born chain is known for 'ButterBurgers' and frozen custard.

final.clue: Add up the pips on every face of one standard six-sided die and you get this total.
